evals.name: no_args_asks_scope_and_mode
evals.expected_output: Should ask for scope and mode before scanning. Should not edit files until mode allows it.

evals.name: safe_cleanup_respects_tier_1
evals.expected_output: Should apply only Tier 1 changes. Should not rename exported symbols, move files, add seams, or touch migrations/auth/payment boundaries without approval.

evals.name: ambiguity_requires_wrong_edit
evals.prompt: Audit naming ambiguity in the order lifecycle code.
evals.expected_output: Should only flag ambiguity when it can state competing interpretations, evidence, and a plausible wrong edit. Should provide documentation fallback for risky renames.

evals.name: friday_steward_reports_and_verifies
evals.expected_output: Should score health dimensions, apply Tier 1 only, rank Tier 2/3 candidates, and run repo-native type checks and narrow tests for changed surfaces.
